visualizerParams.title: Binary XOR Logic Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The manual binary XOR implementation is producing incorrect results. It seems the bitwise comparison logic for 'Exclusive OR' is wrong. Identify and fix the flaw.

solution.explanation: Exclusive OR (XOR) returns 1 only if the bits are DIFFERENT (`ca != cb`). The buggy code used `ca == cb`, which is the logic for a XNOR (Exclusive NOR) gate.
